query: phase 4.4 observability skill tool continuity gate

results.title: Minder planning reprioritization non-scale Phase 4
results.content: Updated planning docs so completed phases through P4.3 are marked done, current next steps are observability plus admin/dashboard expansion, and cluster/scale work is explicitly deferred for now. Synced TASK_BREAKDOWN, PROJECT_PROGRESS, and PLAN to treat PROJECT_PROGRESS as the canonical status board and to keep P4-T01/T02/T03/T06/T11 and full scale gate deferred until needed.

results.title: Phase 4.3 completed with console serving seam
results.content: Completed Phase 4.3 without creating a commit. Added dashboard config for base_path/static_dir/legacy_compat_enabled, served built dashboard assets under /console, redirected legacy setup/login/dashboard GET routes to /console equivalents when compatibility is disabled, and added tests/integration/test_phase4_3_console_gate.py. Focused verification now passes for architecture extraction, admin use cases, Astro scaffold, HTTP admin routes, setup/login flows, and console static serving. Broader Phase 4 remains open for observability and production hardening.

results.title: Close Phase 4 docs after observability UI landed
results.content: Updated TASK_BREAKDOWN and PROJECT_PROGRESS to reflect that the current non-scale Phase 4 product scope is closed. Marked P4-T10 done based on the shipped /dashboard/observability page and script, kept P4-T12 and P4-VERIFY deferred due missing formal security-review artifact, and reordered Phase 4 wave tracking to match implementation sequence.

results.title: Phase 4.2 dashboard client management closed
results.content: Closed P4.2 by adding tests/e2e/test_phase4_2_dashboard_gate.py as a browser-only acceptance gate covering admin browser login, dashboard client creation, detail view, onboarding snippets, browser connection test, key rotation, revoke, recent activity visibility, and post-revoke denial. Updated README.md, docs/guides/admin-client-onboarding.md, and docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md to mark P4.2-VERIFY done and note that broader Phase 4 now returns to observability/production/security backlog. Verified with pytest, mypy, and ruff. Commit: adf1eb8.

results.title: Phase 4.4 continuity contract and envelope
results.content: Implemented a shared continuity contract in src/minder/continuity.py and wired it into session restore, memory recall, workflow guard, and graph workflow planning/reasoning. Session restore now returns continuity_packet with instruction_envelope + session_brief; memory recall is step-aware; workflow guard reports violations and deterministic envelopes; query workflow planner injects the envelope/brief into reasoning prompts. Verified with uv run pytest tests/unit/test_continuity_tools.py tests/unit/test_nodes.py tests/unit/test_session_client_flow.py tests/integration/test_tools.py.
